model_specification_line: smf.wls('full_time ~ daca_eligible + daca_x_post + C(statefip) + C(year)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})
sample_selection: CITIZEN in [3, 4] (non-citizen; proxy for undocumented status)
YEAR in [2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016] (2012 excluded as DACA transition year)
YRIMMIG <= 2007 (in US continuously since at least 2007)
